## NYT::NFlow::TUnitedParameters&lt;NYT::NFlow::TMoniumSink&gt; {#NYT_NFlow_TUnitedParameters_NYT_NFlow_TMoniumSink}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/registry-inl.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/common/registry-inl.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `driver_resource_id` | **Type**: `NYT::NFlow::TStrongIdentifierTypedef<NYT::NFlow::TResourceIdTag>`
**Default value**: `MoniumDriver`
Resource ID of `TMoniumDriver` in the pipeline spec. Default is `MoniumDriver`. ||
|| `project` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Monium project to which the metric is written. ||
|| `service` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Service name in Monium notation. ||
|| `cluster` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Cluster name in Monium notation. ||
|| `metrics` | **Type**: `std::vector<NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TMoniumMetricParameters](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TMoniumMetricParameters)`>>`
**Required parameter**
List of metric configs. Each element describes the mapping of one input stream row to one `Metric` message (`metric_value_column`, `metric_type`, `labels`). ||
|| `timestamp_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Column with type `Timestamp` or `Uint64` (microseconds since epoch) whose value is written to `Metric.timestamp`. ||
|| `metric_name_label` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `sensor`
Label that stores the sensor name (the value of `metric_value_column`). Default is `sensor`. ||
|| `sensor_name_column` | **Type**: `std::optional<std::string>`
 ||
|| `skip_null_labels` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `true`
Skip rows where at least one label column equals `null`. Default is `true`. ||
|| `skip_metrics_with_null_timestamp` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `true`
Skip rows with an empty timestamp. Default is `true`. ||
|| `write_timeout` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `30s`
Timeout for a single `MetricsDataService.Write` call. Applied as a per-call gRPC deadline. ||
|| `channel_count` | **Type**: `std::optional<long>`
Number of receiver channels. If not set, the framework's default value is used. ||
|#
